name: Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, halve and seed fresh plum tomatoes.
2. Place the tomatoes on racks and bake them in a 175 F (80 C) oven until they are wrinkled and dry, taking about 16 to 18 hours.
3. In a jar, sprinkle a thin layer of rock salt at the bottom.
4. Arrange the baked tomatoes in the jar.
5. Cover the tomatoes with olive oil, ensuring they are completely immersed.
6. Add a sprig of rosemary or a couple of dried chilies to the oil, if desired.
7. Store the jar in the refrigerator for up to one month before using.
8. Use the sun-dried tomatoes in pasta sauces, chop them finely with olives for a salsa to serve with fish, or mix them with cream cheese to make a spread for crackers. You can also give them away as gifts.
9. Sun-dried tomatoes can be stored indefinitely in the refrigerator.
